Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/kqnqzyklwfrhtywimsjm/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_5aeff96e3a186be79a83214ad02fb1dcc32fe930' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"query": "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS public.finance_ledger \(id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid\(\), user_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES auth.users\(id\), entry_date DATE NOT NULL, entry_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK \(entry_type IN \('\\''revenue'\\'', '\\''payment_received'\\''\)\), source_type TEXT NOT NULL CHECK \(source_type IN \('\\''sale'\\'', '\\''invoice'\\'', '\\''payment'\\''\)\), source_id UUID NOT NULL, description TEXT NOT NULL, amount NUMERIC\(12,2\) NOT NULL, cost_center TEXT, invoice_type TEXT, reference_number TEXT, recorded_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users\(id\), created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW\(\)\); ALTER TABLE public.finance_ledger ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY; CREATE POLICY IF NOT EXISTS finance_ledger_insert ON public.finance_ledger FOR INSERT TO authenticated WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\); CREATE POLICY IF NOT EXISTS finance_ledger_select ON public.finance_ledger FOR SELECT TO authenticated USING \(true\); GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON public.finance_ledger TO authenticated;"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/kqnqzyklwfrhtywimsjm/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_5aeff96e3a186be79a83214ad02fb1dcc32fe930' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"query": "ALTER TABLE public.finance_ledger ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY"}')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://api.supabase.com/v1/projects/kqnqzyklwfrhtywimsjm/database/query -H 'Authorization: Bearer sbp_5aeff96e3a186be79a83214ad02fb1dcc32fe930' -H 'Content-Type: application/json' --data-binary '{"query": "CREATE POLICY \\"finance_ledger_insert\\" ON public.finance_ledger FOR INSERT TO authenticated WITH CHECK \(auth.uid\(\) = user_id\); CREATE POLICY \\"finance_ledger_select\\" ON public.finance_ledger FOR SELECT TO authenticated USING \(true\); GRANT SELECT, INSERT ON public.finance_ledger TO authenticated"}')
